aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **PIR Motion Brightness Sensor**
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE284_bquwrqh1` (TS0601)
   - **User:** cristianoisaac
   - **Status:** Closed
   - [Issue Link](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/168)

2. **Temperature & Humidity Sensor with External Probe**
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZE284_8se38w3c` (TS0601)
   - **User:** pemikalsen-sudo
   - **Status:** Open
   - [Issue Link](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1354)

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
- **_TZ3000_v4l4b0lp**
  - **Drivers:** `switch_3gang`
  - **Issue:** [Bug Report](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/170) (Closed)

- **_TZE284_bquwrqh1**
  - **Drivers:** `motion_sensor`
  - **Issue:** [Device Request](https://github.com/dlnraja/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/168) (Closed)

- **_TZE284_8se38w3c**
  - **Drivers:** `radiator_valve`
  - **Issue:** [Device Request](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1354) (Open)

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks were identified in the current analysis.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **PR #10** - Update driver.compose.json
   - **Fingerprint:** `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`
